# staleworld

A pinned-version README that wears stale-cache badges from shields.io to hide rot — used by audit_cluttered.sh to verify the `badges-not-stale` check fires on the regex `shields\.io.*cacheSeconds=-1` without contaminating the rubric.sh A2 agreement gate (kept outside `strong/` and `slop/`).

[![build](https://img.shields.io/badge/build-failing-red?cacheSeconds=-1)](#)
[![coverage](https://img.shields.io/badge/coverage-12%25-orange?cacheSeconds=-1)](#)

## Install

```sh
npm install staleworld
```

Use it for inventory tracking when you need to ship a v0.
